mapper.select: SELECT * FROM prompt_template WHERE template_type = #{templateType} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prompt_template ( name, template_type, template_content, variable_mapping, version, description, is_active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{templateType}, #{content}, #{variableMapping, typeHandler=cn.qrfeng.lianai.game.handler.JsonMapTypeHandler}, #{version}, #{description}, #{active}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE prompt_template SET name = #{name}, template_content = #{content}, variable_mapping = #{variableMapping, typeHandler=cn.qrfeng.lianai.game.handler.JsonMapTypeHandler}, version = #{version}, description = #{description}, is_active = #{active}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM prompt_template ORDER BY template_type, version DESC
